disabled.description: Indicates if the service account is disabled; useful for managing account lifecycle.

display_name.description: Human-readable name of the service account; useful for identification in UI or logs.

email.description: Email address of the service account; required for authentication and API access.

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the service account in configurations.

member.description: IAM member string for the service account; useful for role bindings.

name.description: Fully qualified name of the service account; useful for API calls and resource linking.

unique_id.description: Globally unique ID of the service account; critical for cross-project operations.
